conclusion: Each lane completed three consecutive bounded, materially distinct native/public rounds with complete candidate-level review and zero net-new accepted uniques. Blocked capability attempts were retained only as path evidence and were not counted. All four lanes meet the documented <5% diminishing-return rule for this wave and should reopen when new entities, citations, or access paths appear.
acceptance_boundary: Only named-organization implementation evidence with an auditable learning or improvement mechanism is accepted. Generic tooling, tutorials, product announcements, anonymous anecdotes, and uncorroborated vendor claims do not count.
